entries.description: Jackfruits, both ripe and unripe are very popular amongst Bishnupriya Manipuris. Savoury and high in calorie.
Pineapples are a popular fruit amongst Bishnupriya Manipuris. Although not native to their natual dwelling conditions but is very much accessible.
The pomelo is a seasonal citrus fruit rich in Vitamin C and minerals. Very popular amongst Bishnupriya Manipuris
Starfruits are also consumed during season and it has very rich medicinal healing properties, particularly Jaundice
